text.value:
The Azure REST API specifications consist of multiple readme files tailored for different services and tools. Here are some notable examples:

1. **Lint Diff Tool ReadMe**: Used for linting differences in code (URL: [Lint Diff README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md)).

2. **Specification for App Data Plane ReadMe**: Contains details specific to app data planes (URL: [App Data Plane README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md)).

3. **Billing Resource Manager CLI ReadMe**: Provides information on billing resource manager using CLI (URL: [Billing Resource Manager README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/billing/resource-manager/readme.cli.md)).

4. **Sample Files README**: Offers guidance on sample file usage (URL: [Sample Files README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/documentation/samplefiles/README.md)).

5. **Nginx Resource Manager Specification ReadMe**: Details about managing Nginx resources (URL: [Nginx Resource Manager README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/nginx/resource-manager/readme.md)).

These documents form a part of the broader Azure REST API specifications repository, which includes configuration, guidelines, and examples for multiple Azure services and applications. Each readme provides specific information about its related tool, service, or usage context. You can explore more by visiting the repository and examining these readmes directly.
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
